name: solnadocash-circuits
description: ZK circuits for SolnadoCash privacy protocol

scripts.compile: mkdir -p build && circom withdraw/withdraw.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build/ -l node_modules && circom deposit/deposit.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build/ -l node_modules && echo 'Withdraw constraints:' && snarkjs r1cs info build/withdraw.r1cs && echo 'Deposit constraints:' && snarkjs r1cs info build/deposit.r1cs
